steps.title: Identify the subject and determine its number
steps.content: The subject is the country's name — a singular noun phrase (one country, one name). The verb must agree with a singular subject.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm
steps.content:
• "are": Plural verb — does not agree with the singular subject the country's name. ✗
  • "have been": Plural verb — does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • "are being": Plural verb — does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • "is": Singular verb — agrees correctly with the country's name. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
